title: Friendship SMP
description: Mod pack for Friendship SMP. This is the pack for a private server designed to have the few specific mods we want while remaining reasonably light.
body:
Mod pack for Friendship SMP. 
I love friendship. You love Friendship. We all love friendship. I love my Friends, so I made this beautiful modpack for them to play.
We got Farmers Delight. We got Create. We got Ad Astra. We got Tinkers' Construct. I intend to become the fastest entity on the server. 
This is a pack for a private server. If you are not a part of this server, there are probably more fun packs out there. I just threw all this together. If you, however, like everything on offer here, you're in luck. This pack is for my friends, and I have friends everywhere, including you, even if I don't know you. Go crazy twin.
